channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump announces arrests in alleged vandalism at Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
item.description: President Donald Trump said U.S. Park Police had arrested multiple individuals he accused of vandalizing the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.

item.title: Vance in Switzerland for talks; Iran announces closure of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran's delegation has also arrived in Switzerland for the negotiations.

item.title: "48 Hours" show schedule
item.description: True crime. Real justice. Missing it would be a crime.

item.title: Newsom declares state of emergency in Los Angeles for Boyle Heights warehouse fire
item.description: Firefighters faced renewed challenges Saturday at a large Boyle Heights warehouse fire, where conditions remain highly complex as Mayor Karen Bass declared...
